# Planning

## Open Plan

- No active project-specific plan in the template. Replace this line with concrete steps when a task starts.

## Locked Decisions

- Keep stable project rules in `Project.md`, `docs/runbook.md`, and `docs/contracts/*`; keep transient task evidence in TaskLogs.

## Evidence Location

Completed implementation steps and command evidence belong in `.github/TaskLogs/Execution.md`.

Historical failures and downgraded-path rationale belong in `.github/TaskLogs/Investigate.md`.
